questions.question: According to Napoleon Dynamite, what are Ligers and why are they bred?
questions.answer: A mix of a lion and a tiger bred for their skill in magic

questions.question: Apple commercials in the 2000s featured two men, one casually dressed and one in a suit. How did they introduce themselves?
